notes: Pure glue/API file: all 6 theorems are one-step compositions of lemmas from HasseBound.lean and Hasse/PointFix.lean, with no mathematical content of their own. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, no proof exceeds 10 lines. The hasse_bound_of_all_witnesses docstring contains a detailed witness-to-Silverman-ticket mapping table.
